title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on knowledge is unwinnable for humans, and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity, human judgment, and creative thinking. He draws on Ramanujan's legacy as an example of undiscovered genius that systems miss, suggesting these qualities remain humanity's distinct advantage.
